page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server allocates one thread per physical core across its two cores. The processor features a 35 MB L3 cache and supports AVX and AVX-512f vector extensions. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates that the ecs.g5ne.large exhibits performance limitations across compute and memory subsystems. In stress-ng testing, single-core CPU performance is categorized as weak, falling into the bottom 25%, while multi-core performance drops into the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests show low throughput, with read-only large block transfers registering at 10.45 GB/sec and write operations at 9.47 GB/sec. Similarly, database and web serving benchmarks, such as Redis SET operations at 1.48 million operations per second and static web serving at 1.26 GB/sec, place this instance in the bottom 10% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5ne.large offers a low-cost entry point for workloads that do not demand high resource density or rapid execution speeds. Given its dedicated CPU allocation but lower-tier performance metrics, it represents a budget-conscious option for lightweight applications. This instance is best suited for basic web serving, minor utility scripts, software development testing, or low-traffic application hosting where performance bottlenecks are not critical to operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under a KVM hypervisor, it provides a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate that this instance sits in the lower tiers, with both single-core and multi-core CPU tests registering as weak or poor, and memory bandwidth limited to approximately 10.45 GB/sec for large block reads. Consequently, the ecs.g5ne.large is positioned as a highly economical option for non-demanding workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, lightweight utility tasks, and development or testing environments that do not require high-throughput computing or intensive database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and a 1 Gbps network baseline, designed for low-throughput utility and testing workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly general-purpose instance with dedicated Intel Xeon processors, suitable for lightweight utility tasks and development environments.
bullet_points: Equipped with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM.
Features a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor.
Lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage.
Demonstrates entry-level performance in CPU and memory bandwidth benchmarks.
Suited for lightweight web serving, development environments, and basic utility tasks.
